findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
deno.json `description` missing
version is '1.0.0'; alpha cadence requires '0.0.1-alpha.0'
deno.json `publish.include` missing — `deno publish` ships everything by default and that leaks tests/scratch
deno.json `publish.exclude` should explicitly drop `**/*_test.ts`, `tests/`, `examples/`
deno.json compilerOptions.strict must be true
deno.json `tasks` missing `publish:dry-run` shortcut
mod.ts is 265 lines; convention cap is 200 — split into sub-entrypoints
mod.ts has 108 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
